name: Marinated Pork Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Pork tenderloin, cut into 8 small pieces
1 medium Sweet red pepper, diced (about 1-1/2 inches)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME
1. In a medium glass bowl, combine yogurt, lemon juice, garlic, cumin and coriander; mix well.
2. Add pork; cover and refrigerate for 6 hours or overnight.
3. Alternate pork, onions, tomatoes and peppers on eight skewers.
4. Grill over medium coals for about 30-35 minutes or until meat reaches desired doneness.
